audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with millennium, abyss, throne, resurrection, judgment imagery; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for binding of dragon, thousand years, first resurrection, final deception, great white throne, lake of fire. Non-sensational handling required.

verses.restored: And I saw a messenger descending from heaven, having key of abyss and great chain upon his hand.
He seized the dragon, the ancient serpent, who is slanderer and adversarial one, and bound him thousand years.
He cast him into abyss, shut and sealed over him, so he might not mislead nations any longer until thousand years were completed; after these things he must be released a little time.

And I saw thrones, and they sat on them, and judgment was given to them; and souls/lives of those beheaded because of witness of Jesus and word of Divine, and those who had not worshiped beast or image and had not received mark on forehead and hand; they lived and reigned with Messiah thousand years.
The rest of dead ones did not live until thousand years were completed. This is the first resurrection.
Blessed and holy is the one having part in first resurrection; over these second death has no authority, but they will be priests of Divine and Messiah and will reign with him thousand years.
When thousand years are completed, the adversarial one will be released from prison,
and will go out to mislead nations in four corners of earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them for war; their number like sand of sea.
They went up over breadth of earth and surrounded camp of holy ones and beloved city, and fire came down from heaven and consumed them.
And the slanderer/adversary misleading them was cast into lake of fire and sulfur, where beast and false prophet also are, and they will be tested day and night into ages of ages.
And I saw a great white throne and the One sitting on it, from whose face earth and heaven fled, and place was not found for them.

And I saw dead ones, great and small, standing before throne; scrolls were opened, and another scroll opened, which is of life; dead ones were judged from things written in scrolls according to their works.
Sea gave the dead in it, and Death and Hades gave the dead in them, and they were judged each according to their works.
Death and Hades were cast into lake of fire. This is second death, the lake of fire.
And if anyone was not found written in scroll of life, one was cast into lake of fire.

translation_notes: Thousand years is apocalyptic-symbolic reign imagery; avoid rigid timeline wars in first pass.
Gog/Magog are symbolic enemies from Ezekiel tradition, not modern nation labels.
The final judgment is according to works and scroll of life; Death and Hades themselves are abolished.
safety_note: Do not use Revelation 20 for fear coercion, date-setting, or modern war-mapping. The symbolic endpoint is removal of deception, beastly power, Death, and Hades.
